# Sankalp Chaturvedi

> Personal portfolio and dev log of Sankalp Chaturvedi — a software developer
> building Python/FastAPI backends, Elasticsearch/Kibana data pipelines, and
> agentic AI systems. The site is styled as a retro arcade game; the content
> underneath is a normal engineering portfolio.

Sankalp Chaturvedi is a Software Developer at Photonmatters (Aug 2025 –
present), where he builds reporting systems on Elasticsearch and Kibana,
scalable Python/FastAPI backends, and backend components for agentic AI
workflows — including a bank statement analyzer that turns unstructured
financial documents into structured, decision-ready output. Previously:
Fullstack Developer Intern at Dozti (React, Node/Express, Docker) and ERP
Developer Intern at Knighthood (ERPNext/Frappe).

Skills: Python, JavaScript, SQL, FastAPI, React, Next.js, Node.js,
Elasticsearch, Kibana, MySQL, MongoDB, Docker, n8n, LLM integrations, RAG,
vector databases, agentic AI, prompt engineering.

Achievements: Smart India Hackathon national top-5 grand finalist (2023),
MetaByte Hackathon global rank 2 (2023), Flipkart GRiD 5.0 top 10% of
~400,000 participants (2023).

## Pages

- [Home](https://snklp.dev/): experience, projects, skills, achievements, contact
- [Dev Log](https://snklp.dev/blog): blog — research notes on backend
  engineering, data pipelines, agentic AI, and anything else under
  investigation; not limited to the topics above
- [RSS feed](https://snklp.dev/rss.xml)

## Projects

- [AI Travel Itinerary Generator](https://github.com/sankalp021/travel-app):
  Next.js + Gemini API travel planner generating day-wise itineraries with
  budgets, stays, and a trip-context chatbot. Live at
  https://backpacker-compass.vercel.app
- [Byte Newz](https://github.com/sankalp021/newsapp): AI news aggregator that
  categorizes multi-source news in real time and serves 100-word AI
  summaries. Live at https://newsapp-ivory-six.vercel.app

## Contact
